programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Adventures of Young Indiana Jones Oganga the Giver and Taker of Life
programme.desc: Africa December 1916 Despite disobeying orders Indy is promoted to Captain after capturing a German machine gun He is then ordered to cross the jungle with Remy and Major Boucher to pick up a shipment of weaponry Along the way his Ubangan Sgt Barthelemy picks up the sole surviving child from a disease ridden village despite Bouchers orders against it On the way back Indy and company succumb to disease themselves and are picked up by Albert Schweitzer and the orderlies from his jungle hospital At first resistant to being treated by a German Indy soon begins to realize that Schweitzer is not interested in war only attempting to cure people against all odds

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Blade and Darkon fight in a final battle to determine Earths future

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is manipulating a tribe of aboriginals with holographic projections of flying rocks The aboriginals think its their god Mimi VENOM is after the secret treasure chamber of Mimi Scott and T-Bob get mixed up with the aboriginals when they think T-Bob is representing their Mimi god At the end Brad saves the day with his hocus pocus mask

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root is starting to wither and the only cure for it is a dose of the ion winds on Solarus II a planet controlled by Saw Boss He destroyed the Solarian people and now uses the healing powers of the winds for his vines

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick chases a psychopath who is burning people alive and tries to protect the targets of the killers rage -- a band of homeless living under the citys streets

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A college student dreams of becoming a werewolf and discovers an antique camera that will turn him into his favorite movie monster

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Billys mother has remarried She Billy and his new stepfather move into their new house on Mothers Day The house is in Springwood The stepfather has a difficult temper and Billy wants more attention from his mother As soon as they arrive they leave Billy alone since they are going on their honeymoon Then he meets his new neighbor the beautiful Barbara who convinces him to organize a party whose outcome will be fatal Meanwhile a radio psychologist finds herself in trouble when she gives bad advice to her listeners She is Barbaras mother and is obsessed with her job as a radio celebrity and needs to put her daughter first

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An abnormally difficult child tests a psychologist

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A gunfighter confronts his past

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A photographer decides not to stop a woman from committing suicide in order to get some good pictures of the tragedy His new female assistant makes him face his lack of empathy

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A nurse wants the husband of her patient for herself so she delves into black magic to get rid of her patient However her plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: The son of a prestigious financial investor is framed for his fathers murder

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: An African prince comes to Stalag 13 who is negotiating with the Germans for the rights in his country to build a submarine base and Hogan replaces him with Kinchloe

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Happy begins sleep-walking due to his insecurity with women Binghamton orders him to be psychiatrically evaluated and shipped out if found unfit for duty So McHale and the guys try to help their Shipmate by fixing him up with a pretty Nurse but must first get around Binghamtons No Fraternization rule

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: The 73 Crews heart-sick Japanese friend Fuji must get a letter to his best girl back home in Japan But a secret mission to mail the letter from a Japanese-held island becomes complicated when Fujis letter gets mixed up in Binghamtons plan to distribute propaganda leaflets to the enemy

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation feeling that he hasnt done his job correctly if he isnt hated by ALL the recruits Sgt Carter asks for a transfer to California but things dont go quite as he expects

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While in town on pass Sgt Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from The Dragon Lady but in order for it to work he will need Dukes help

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After one full year of marriage Luke and Kate finally get to go on their honeymoon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke McCoy is tricked into buying a swimming pool

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS impersonators are running around causing chaos in CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 go to a South American country dressed as flamenco dancers to save the President of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ brokers a reconciliation between Lil and her estranged father while also assisting Lil in fending off a crooked mining executive and his goons who are determined to lay claim to her gold mine

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: What happens when the swamp itself is no longer an ally to Swamp Thing The answers lay with a man called Mephisto

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans land on the planet Arkadia where glyphs suggest it is the cradle of civilisation from which life on Earth began Now it is desolate and Koenig feels it is unsuitable for colonisation Two renegade crew members have other ideas however and take Helena hostage in their demands to settle on Arkadia

programme.title: Robot Jox
programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are skinny-dipping in a local pond when two pool hustlers steal both the cousins clothing and the General Lee Rosco soon pursues who he thinks are the Duke boys but the crooks drive the stolen General Lee into the lake When nobody is found with the car Rosco tearfully announces that Bo and Luke have drowned Bo and Luke arrive home safe and sound then learn that Boss has used their alleged deaths to implicate them on the theft of his gold watch so he can fraudulently collect the insurance money The Duke boys and Cooter concoct a scheme to turn the General Lee into a ghost and haunt Boss and Rosco until they admit their scheme

programme.title: Hercules 215
programme.desc: Hercules 215

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While a dying colonel implants his brain in a deceased criminal the Taelons show a new electromagnetic pulse weapon Jonathan Doors wishes to acquire it

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood team consults with noted linguist Adrian Bouchard Cedric Smith to decipher the aliens transmissions

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble and a beautiful trucking dispatcher fall in love but shes afraid to tell him about legal restrictions against her

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: Nick and Heath on the trail of a gang of murderous raiders stealing horses in the Valley enlist the help of the ex-sheriff of Stockton The motivation behind his help proves interesting and totally unexpected-especially to the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Helping a friend keep her saloon from a crooked gambling combine Cheyenne runs it while she gets to know her daughter who for ten years has been at school back East and knows nothing of how her mother earned the money that kept her there

programme.title: Young 216
programme.desc: Young 216

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old college friend of Steves is now a father - and part of a vigilante group fed up with the rampant crime in their neighborhood Their latest crackdown however leaves a police informer dead

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF must thwart four young Nazis from claiming Hitlers fortune which they plan to use to finance a Fourth Reich

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Highlander II The Quickening
programme.desc: In this sci-fifantasy sequel Connor MacLeod Christopher Lambert has become an elderly man after losing his immortality Living in a bleak future where the world is protected from solar radiation by a massive shield MacLeod regains his youth when he kills two assassins from his home planet This results in an ongoing battle with the villainous and powerful Gen Katana Michael Ironside but MacLeod receives help when the noble Juan Ramirez Sean Connery returns

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Jesse Arnett attributes most of his success to his coaches, in particular Jake Peacock. Jake was born with only a partial arm. This coach and fighter doesn't let that stop him from training some of the best athletes in the world.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.desc: The city of Turad is ruled by a demon queen According to an old prophecy she will be defeated only by a child of a stargazer The team is trying to fulfill the prophecy but for them to succeed Diana will have to make a hard choice

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Following Audrics signal the Lightning League enters the Pirates Guild zone commanded by the pirate queen Morgana an old love of Hercs The Pride is boarded robbed and Herc and Oon are taken prisoners Jayce Gillian and Flora follow them concealed by an invisible bubble Saw Boss is given Oon as his share of the loot but he recognizes him and insists upon having Jayce Morgana reluctantly attempts to force Herc to tell of Jayces whereabouts but then she changes sides and fights Saw Boss Jayce rescues Herc and Morgana and she gives up her pirating ways to fight Monster Minds
